title: Dashboard Layout with React Router
subtitle: SPA routing, nested layouts, Link, Outlet, and multi-page structure
mission: Learn routing by building a dashboard.
expectedOutcome: Install and configure React Router in a Vite app
Build a dashboard layout with sidebar and navbar using nested routes
Navigate with Link without full page reloads
definitionOfDone: Sidebar and navbar persist across dashboard pages
TypeScript types for route params where used

tomorrowPreview.title: Custom Hooks and Responsive Layout
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will extract shared logic into custom hooks, debounce search input, and polish sidebar, navbar, and theme toggle with responsive layout patterns.
